transition_log.note: Phase 0 (Setup) authored and closed retroactively: its definition was the byte-identical EDIT-ME stub while seven Phase-1-scoped PRs had already merged. Phase-0 DoD verified against the seeded bootstrap (gate, skill tiers, commands, named agents + library, ADR foundation, work-tracking machinery). Phase review panel: historian + scope-auditor (dispatch floor for .work/phases/) and existential-challenger (mandatory at /phase-complete per ADR-013, run from the review library pending its WORK-0005 promotion to a named agent). Retro and panel verdicts under .work/reviews/phase-0-complete-2026-05-28/.
